title: Records of the department
doc_html:
§2428.  Records of the department

The records of the department, except records which the rules require to be held confidential for reasons of public policy, shall be public records and shall be open to public inspection, subject to regulations as to the time and manner of inspection prescribed by the director.
doc_text:
§2428.  Records of the department
The records of the department, except records which the rules require to be held confidential for reasons of public policy, shall be public records and shall be open to public inspection, subject to regulations as to the time and manner of inspection prescribed by the director.
